context_for_next_testing_agent: Header UI reorganization tested and verified. Two-row compact layout working correctly. Row 1 contains: logo, search bar, utility buttons (theme, language, automations, trash, analytics, notifications), admin separator + admin tools (undo, invite, activity, options, operators, form fields), user profile. Row 2 (board bar) contains: board selector + refresh + board name + order count | action buttons | admin board tools. All modals accessible. No layout issues.
